---
name: Question
about: Ask a question about how to use a skill, the installer, or the project
title: "[question] "
labels: question
---

## What do you want to know?

A clear and concise description of your question.

## What have you tried so far?

Links, docs, commands, or skill outputs you've already explored.

## Context

- Skill in question: [e.g. `backend-test`]
- Project type you're working on: [e.g. Node.js API, Python service, Go microservice]
- Goal: [e.g. "I want to add JWT auth to my Express app"]

## Environment

- OS:
- Opencode version (if known):
- Node version: [output of `node -v`]
